steps.title: Compute c
steps.content: $c$ is the multiplicative factor when $x$ increases by 2. For $f(x) = 42 \cdot (\text{base})^{\text{exp}}$, compute base raised to power 2 in each choice: A gives $2^{12} = 4096$, B gives $8^4 = 4096$, C gives $64^2 = 4096$, D gives $4096^1 = 4096$. All are equivalent, so $c = 4096$.

steps.title: Scan for 4096 as a visible literal base
steps.content:
A: $42(2)^{6x}$ — base is 2, not 4096.
B: $42(8)^{2x}$ — base is 8, not 4096.
C: $42(64)^x$ — base is 64, not 4096.
D: $42(4{,}096)^{x/2}$ — base is 4096, which is c displayed literally. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
